Article.ArticleTitle: Mycoplasma Genitalium - Where are we at?

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: School of Translational Medicine, Monash University, Carlton, VIC, Australia. Catriona.bradshaw@monash.edu.
Melbourne Sexual Health Centre, Alfred Hospital, Carlton, VIC, Australia. Catriona.bradshaw@monash.edu.
School of Population and Global Health, University of Melbourne, Parkville, VIC, Australia. Catriona.bradshaw@monash.edu.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics Approval: Ethics approval for collection of data on trends in moxifloxacin use and cure at Melbourne Sexual Health Centre was provided by the Alfred Hospital Ethics Committee, Melbourne, Australia (ID: 232/16). Competing interests: CSB receives Australian government funding from the National Health and Medical Research Council and Australian Research Council that supports her investigator led research and funds LAV. KH is supported by an Australian Government Department of Higher Education Research Training Scholarship and Royal Australasian College of Physician Research Entry Scholarship. There are no other conflicts of interest.
